summary: Frontend-only testing for convert-to-invoice button fix in Devis Signés / Réception sub-tab. All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: Convert button (data-testid='reception-convert-{quoteId}') now appears in Devis Signés / Réception sub-tab for signed/accepted quotes that haven't been converted
FIX VERIFIED: 'Converti' badge (data-testid='reception-converted-{quoteId}') appears for already-converted quotes
FIX VERIFIED: Clicking convert button shows native confirm dialog, on accept calls POST /api/invoices/{id}/convert-to-invoice, creates new Invoice with convertedFromQuoteId set
REGRESSION PASSED: Main 'Liste des Devis' convert button (data-testid='convert-to-invoice-{quoteId}') still works
REGRESSION PASSED: Demo tenant (admin@smartdesk.cg, companyId=demo-1) can convert quotes - no demo-specific restriction
Code structure at Sales.tsx lines 896-980 correctly implements the reception space table with convert functionality
seed_data_creation: Used existing test quotes: TEST_DEBUG3_DEV_1777898076 (converted during test), TEST_MANUAL_DEV_1777897948 (already converted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Convert-to-invoice fix verified. TEST_DEBUG3_DEV_1777898076 was converted to INV-1777901746847 during testing. All signed quotes in demo-1 are now converted. To test conversion again, create a new quote with status 'Signed' or 'Accepted'.

fix_verification.test: Reception space shows convert button for unconverted signed quotes
Reception space shows 'Converti' badge for already-converted quotes
Clicking convert button triggers conversion flow
fix_verification.details: Native confirm dialog accepted, POST /api/invoices/TEST_DEBUG3_DEV_1777898076/convert-to-invoice called, new invoice INV-1777901746847 created

fix_verification.test: After conversion, quote shows 'Converti' badge instead of convert button
fix_verification.details: Convert button removed after successful conversion
TEST_DEBUG3_DEV_1777898076 has convertedToInvoiceId: INV-1777901746847, status: Converted

regression_tests.test: Main 'Liste des Devis' still shows convert button for eligible quotes
regression_tests.details: Convert button with data-testid='convert-to-invoice-{quoteId}' present in main list

regression_tests.test: Demo tenant can convert quotes (no demo-specific restriction)
Already-converted quotes show 'Converti' badge and no convert button
regression_tests.details: Verified in both reception space and main list

navigation_tests.test: Navigate to Sales → Devis → Devis Signés / Réception
navigation_tests.details: Sub-tab accessible and displays signed quotes correctly
